name: whatsup
description: WhatsApp messaging for Claude Code via Baileys WebSocket client

hooks.command: node -e 'const v=parseInt(process.versions.node);if(v<18){console.error("whatsup requires Node.js 18+, found "+process.version);process.exit(1)}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Node.js 18+ not found. whatsup requires Node.js 18+ to run.'
